---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement to the design workflow
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Use case

What are you trying to do? What problem does this solve?

## Proposed solution

How should the skill handle this? Describe the workflow change or addition.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why this one is better.

## Additional context

Examples, mockups, or references that help illustrate the idea.
